description: Case style: Stainless steel rectangular case Dial style: Black dial with silver and white coloured hands roman numeralsStrap style: Steel strap with butterfly claspFeatures: Branding on the 12 and 6 hour mark and a screw to reset time date aperture at the 3 hour markWaterproof to 3 ATM, wearable around sinks and in mild rains Warranty:  1 year
